title: Make Meshtastic native_sim tests Twister-compatible
description: Direct west build -t run passes for meshtastic_adapter, meshtastic_codec, and meshtastic_ble on native_sim, but an EC2 Twister attempt for these tests failed under native_sim runner argument handling and Bluetooth device setup. Fix test metadata/configuration so these tests can be run reliably through west twister, or document the expected direct-run path if Twister is unsuitable for BLE host tests.
notes: Evidence-only no-hardware completion on current main (20cf10f) using clean EC2 worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-meshtastic-twister. Explorer/test-design subagents mapped current metadata and verification matrix; no code/script/doc edits were made, so codereview requirement did not apply for this Bead. Native Twister command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -p native_sim --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-t2hn52-repro-native -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-meshtastic-twister/lichen ; result PASS 3/3 configs, 0 skipped, 108 test cases, 0 warnings, 67.02s. qemu control with --integration intentionally skipped 2/2 configs because meshtastic_adapter and meshtastic_codec declare native_sim as integration_platforms. qemu control command without --integration: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn52-repro-qemu-v2 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-meshtastic-twister/lichen ; result PASS 2/2 configs, 0 skipped, 97 test cases, 0 warnings, 46.43s. Conclusion: meshtastic_adapter, meshtastic_codec, and meshtastic_ble are now reliably Twister-runnable on native_sim; non-BLE codec/adapter also run on qemu_x86. Generated twister-out-* directories remain uncommitted.
close_reason: Completed by EC2 Twister evidence on current main. Native_sim meshtastic_adapter/codec/ble passed 3/3 configs with 108 cases and 0 warnings; qemu_x86 codec/adapter passed 2/2 configs with 97 cases and 0 warnings. No code changes required.
